libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Generate tests against the resolved 2.9.1 artifact and prefer the public Guice API. Do not reuse 2.1.7-only internal imports such as com.google.inject.internal.util.MapMaker or com.google.inject.internal.cglib.proxy.MethodProxy; in 2.9.1 those internals are hidden/renamed with $-prefixed binary names. Preserve the existing --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED build configuration if exercising CGLIB/proxy paths.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8858 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-guice:2.9.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that target Guice internals are fragile across this version jump and may fail at javac even though no dependency is missing.
org.slf4j:slf4j-api is optional in the POM and not required for core meaningful coverage; only add it if a test deliberately covers SLF4J integration.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed. The resolved 2.9.1 artifact brings its normal runtime dependencies transitively; the javac failure is from stale tests importing 2.1.7 internal class names that are no longer present under those names in 2.9.1.
